title: 毎日杯の後に・行雲流水

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yaeno Muteki has won the Mainichi Hai!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she raced, she became aware of the stark
contrast between her own running style and Oguri
Cap's relaxed gait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a great performance under her belt, Yaeno
Muteki sets her sights on the Satsuki Sho. The
start of the Classic Triple Crown tour is within
sight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her classmate and rival Mejiro Ardan
has to sit out the Satsuki Sho. It seems like her
legs are in poor condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's an unfortunate turn of events, it doesn't
change Yaeno Muteki's ambition. She declares
Sakura Chiyono O her rival and vows to defeat
her.
